## Summary

What this changes and why.

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated (a bug fix starts with a failing test)
- [ ] Golden requirements snippets for any new or changed rule
- [ ] `uv run ruff check .` passes
- [ ] `uv run mypy src` passes
- [ ] `uv run pytest` passes
- [ ] No unnecessary runtime dependencies added
- [ ] No em dash characters in docs or commit messages
